description: Fix War phase flow (Zorro placement before battles) and improve Betrayal sidebar UI
steps: WAR PHASE ZORRO FIX in src/components/BattlePanel.tsx: At the top of the BattlePanel component (after the coinDistributionPending check), add an early return if gameState.zorroPlacementActive is true. Return null or a simple panel showing 'Zorro esta colocando Bushi'. This prevents any battle popups from showing during Zorro placement. The GameBoard already handles Zorro placement UI via RegionCard highlights.

BETRAYAL SIDEBAR UI REWORK in src/components/ActionPanel.tsx: In the betrayMandateActive section (around line 449-490), make these changes: (A) Remove the text 'JUGADOR 1 DE 1'. (B) Replace the mandate description text with 'Puedes reemplazar 2 figuras de clanes distintos desde tu reserva.' (C) Below 'Reemplazos restantes: N', show large icons (size 36-40) of the figure types the player can deploy: BushiIcon if issuer.bushi > 0, ShintoIcon if issuer.shinto > 0, MonsterIcon if issuer has an undeployed monster card. (D) Below the icons, show 'Pulsa sobre la figura que quieras sustituir en el mapa'. (E) Add a section below showing completed replacements: for each replacement done (track in gameState - use betrayReplacements array or compute from log), show the replacement info with clan shield, player name in color, and the province. (F) Keep the 'Terminar' button.

BETRAYAL STATE TRACKING: In src/types/game.ts, add a new field to GameState: betrayReplacements: { figureType: string; targetOwnerClanId: string; targetOwnerName: string; provinceId: string; provinceName: string }[]. Initialize it as [] in createInitialGameState (src/utils/gameLogic.ts). In betraySelectFigure (src/utils/gameLogic.ts), push each replacement to this array. Clear it in finalizeBetray and skipBetrayTurn.

BETRAYAL AVAILABLE FIGURES CHECK: In ActionPanel.tsx, compute which figure types the issuer can deploy by checking: (A) issuer.bushi > 0 for BushiIcon, (B) issuer.shinto > 0 for ShintoIcon, (C) For monsters: check if issuer has any undeployed monster card (seasonCards with cardType='monster' where the card id is not deployed as a figure in any province). Show only the icons of types they CAN deploy.
acceptance_criteria: During Zorro placement phase, no battle popups appear - BattlePanel returns null or informational message
Betrayal sidebar shows 'Puedes reemplazar 2 figuras de clanes distintos desde tu reserva.' instead of old text
No 'JUGADOR 1 DE 1' text in betrayal sidebar
Large figure type icons shown based on what player can deploy from reserve
Completed replacements shown with clan seal, player name, and province
